hero.title: DARUL-ULAMA ISLAMIC ORGANIZATION
hero.subtitle: Building knowledge, supporting students, and strengthening the Ummah.

about_preview.label: Who We Are
about_preview.title: Empowering the Next Generation of Scholars
about_preview.text: Established in 2012 G.C., Darul-Ulama Majlis is a respected Islamic institution dedicated to teaching authentic Islamic knowledge. It has grown from 300 students into a prominent center serving nearly 5,000 learners from across Ethiopia.

impact.title: Our Growing Impact
impact.subtitle: Together, we are making a tangible difference in the lives of thousands of students across the country.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.quran_sunnah_desc: Everything we do is rooted in the authentic teachings of the Qur’an and the Sunnah.
values.ikhlas_desc: Our mission is driven by a sincere desire to serve Allah and support the Ummah.
values.amanah_desc: We handle every donation and responsibility with the highest level of integrity.
values.principles_desc: Preserving and promoting the timeless values of Islamic heritage and ethics.

cta_banner.title: Support the Seekers of Knowledge and Earn Lasting Rewards
cta_banner.subtitle: 'When a person dies, his deeds come to an end except for three: Sadaqah Jariyah, knowledge which is beneficial, and a righteous child who prays for him.'

about.title: Our Story & Mission
about.subtitle: A journey of faith, education, and community support in the heart of Ethiopia.
about.history_p1: Darul-Ulama Majlis was established in 2012 as a respected Islamic public institution dedicated to teaching authentic Islamic knowledge. It was founded by Sheikh Jamal Khalifa, a devoted scholar who spent over 20 years pursuing and mastering Islamic studies.
about.history_p2: What began as a small gathering of 300 students has grown into a prestigious institution serving nearly 5,000 students from across Ethiopia, becoming a beacon of knowledge and guidance.
about.growth_p1: Our curriculum covers a wide range of essential Islamic subjects, including:
about.growth_p2: While some students are supported by their families or generous local Muslim communities, many others face serious challenges. In some cases, students walk up to 5 kilometers just to find food, sacrificing valuable time that could be spent learning. This heartbreaking reality led to the establishment of the Darul-Ulama Islamic Organization.
about.q1: What does Darul-Ulama Islamic Organization do?
about.a1_p1: The organization was created under Darul-Ulama Majlis with a clear mission: to respond to urgent humanitarian and educational needs. Its impactful work includes:
a1_list: Providing daily meals to students of Islamic knowledge across Ethiopia who cannot support themselves
Offering stipends to new converts to Islam who are dedicated to learning and practicing their faith
Distributing food packages and donations to orphans in various regions
Planning to support and feed elderly individuals in the future, without any discrimination based on religion.
about.a2: The organization is led with strong integrity and accountability by its president, Sheikh Jamal Khalifa, along with the vice president (Amir), Abdala Adem. Every financial decision is carefully monitored, and not a single dollar is spent without their direct approval, ensuring full transparency and trust.
about.q3: How does your Sadaqah reach those in need?
about.a3: Darul-Ulama Islamic Organization proudly operates under a 100% donation policy. This means that every single penny you donate goes directly to the cause you choose to support. Project funds and administrative expenses are completely separated. No donation intended for charity work is ever used for marketing, administration, or fundraising. Your trust is honored with complete honesty and care.
about.q4: So, how are operational expenses covered?
about.a4_p1: To maximize the impact of your generosity, the organization uses alternative methods to cover its daily operational costs:
a4_list: Admin Fund: A dedicated fund where supporters can contribute specifically toward administrative expenses
Gift Aid: Where applicable, Gift Aid contributions are used to support operational costs without affecting the original donation
Sponsors: Strategic partnerships help expand the organization's reach and strengthen its ability to serve more people in need.
about.legacy_text: Fulfill your Dunya while building your Akhirah. Support our mission and become part of this ongoing mission.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We provide holistic support to ensure students can focus entirely on their spiritual and academic journey.
services.humanity_quote: 'The best of people are those that bring most benefit to the rest of mankind.'

items.title: Student Financial Support
items.description: Direct financial assistance to cover living expenses and tuition fees for underprivileged students.

items.title: Food & Daily Needs
items.description: Ensuring every student has access to nutritious meals and basic daily essentials.

items.title: Islamic Education Support
items.description: Providing books, teaching materials, and improving classroom environments for better learning.

items.title: Community & Relief
items.description: Broader social programs to strengthen the local communities where our students live and study.

donation.title: Support Our Mission
donation.subtitle: Your generosity empowers us to advance our goals and expand our impact. Every contribution—no matter the size—plays a meaningful role in making a lasting difference.
donation.appeals_intro: Be part of a powerful change by supporting one of our impactful initiatives:
donation.qr_subtitle: Scan to donate instantly using your banking app.
donation.intl_text: Please contact us directly for SWIFT codes and further international transfer.

students.title: Support Students of Knowledge
students.description: Help nourish a student’s journey of learning with just $3 per day for meals.

converts.title: Support New Converts to Islam
converts.description: Provide both daily meals and a stipend for students who have embraced Islam — $4 per person.

water.title: Drill a Water Well
water.description: Give the gift of clean, life-saving water to an entire community — $7,000 per well.

mosque.title: Build a Mosque
mosque.description: Contribute to building a house of worship and unity. The cost varies depending on the size and location.

orphans.title: Support Orphans
orphans.description: Bring hope and care to a child in need — contributions start from just $5.

food.title: Provide Food Packs for Families
food.description: Feed a struggling family with essential supplies for only $10 per family.

homes.title: Build Homes for the Homeless
homes.description: Help restore dignity and shelter by building a home — approximately $2,000 per house.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our programs or want to get involved? We'd love to hear from you.
